scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "bun run --cwd apps/api dev" "bun run --cwd apps/web dev"
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/contracts test && bun run --cwd packages/db test && bun run --cwd packages/shared test && bun run --cwd apps/api test && bun run --cwd apps/web test
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/contracts lint && bun run --cwd packages/db lint && bun run --cwd packages/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/config lint && bun run --cwd apps/api lint && bun run --cwd apps/web lint
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/contracts build && bun run --cwd packages/db build && bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/config build && bun run --cwd apps/api build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
